mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month momentum in retail sales signals resilient household demand and near-term earnings support, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days when RSAFS growth is stronger than its recent trend.
evidence_refs: series:RSAFS
fact:RSAFS vintage value was 709590 for 2024-03-01 in the 2024-04-15 snapshot
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month RSAFS growth does not produce higher subsequent 20-day S&P 500 returns than lower RSAFS growth in at least 55% of walk-forward monthly evaluation windows.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate is above 5% and CPI is still rising over 3 months, restrictive policy and persistent inflation raise discount rates and reduce equity valuation multiples, producing negative S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS crosses above 5.0% while CPIAUCSL 3-month percent change is positive
evidence_refs: series:FEDFUNDS
series:CPIAUCSL
fact:FEDFUNDS vintage value was 5.33 for 2024-03-01 in the 2024-04-15 snapshot
fact:CPIAUCSL vintage value was 312.23 for 2024-03-01 in the 2024-04-15 snapshot
regime_hint: restrictive monetary policy with persistent inflation
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations have positive 20-day S&P 500 returns more than 60% of the time or if their mean return is not below the unconditional mean by at least 25 basis points.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in unemployment of more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months signals labor-market deterioration and recession-risk repricing, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
evidence_refs: series:UNRATE
fact:UNRATE vintage value was 3.8 for 2024-03-01 in the 2024-04-15 snapshot
failure_condition: Reject if triggered periods do not have lower 60-day forward S&P 500 returns than non-triggered periods in at least two thirds of rolling 3-year walk-forward samples.

mechanism_narrative: Declining industrial production over a 3-month window signals weakening real activity and lower operating leverage for cyclical firms, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: series:INDPRO
fact:INDPRO vintage value was 102.3313 for 2024-02-01 in the 2024-04-15 snapshot
failure_condition: Reject if negative 3-month INDPRO momentum is followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 65% of observations and the return spread versus positive INDPRO momentum is not negative.

mechanism_narrative: A housing-starts rebound during a stable-rate period signals improving interest-sensitive demand and stronger construction-linked earnings, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST rises by more than 10% over 3 months while FEDFUNDS does not rise over the same window
evidence_refs: series:HOUST
series:FEDFUNDS
fact:HOUST vintage value was 1521.0 for 2024-02-01 in the 2024-04-15 snapshot
fact:FEDFUNDS vintage value was 5.33 for 2024-03-01 in the 2024-04-15 snapshot
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations fail to outperform the unconditional 60-day S&P 500 return by at least 50 basis points on average in walk-forward testing.

mechanism_narrative: Decelerating CPI while the federal funds rate is flat or falling signals improving real-rate credibility and lower expected policy pressure, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month percent change falls versus its prior 3-month percent change while FEDFUNDS is flat or lower
evidence_refs: series:CPIAUCSL
series:FEDFUNDS
fact:CPIAUCSL vintage value was 312.23 for 2024-03-01 in the 2024-04-15 snapshot
fact:FEDFUNDS vintage value was 5.33 for 2024-03-01 in the 2024-04-15 snapshot
failure_condition: Reject if the triggered signal has a 20-day forward hit rate below the unconditional positive-return frequency or a rolling 3-year Rank IC below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth with a non-rising unemployment rate signals expanding labor income without immediate recession stress, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days through risk-on earnings revisions.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS increases over 3 months while UNRATE does not rise over 3 months
evidence_refs: series:PAYEMS
series:UNRATE
fact:PAYEMS vintage value was 158133.0 for 2024-03-01 in the 2024-04-15 snapshot
fact:UNRATE vintage value was 3.8 for 2024-03-01 in the 2024-04-15 snapshot
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations do not produce a higher 5-day positive-return frequency than the unconditional baseline in at least 60% of annual walk-forward test folds.

mechanism_narrative: Positive real GDP growth signals broad demand expansion and stronger aggregate earnings capacity, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days when the latest GDPC1 reading exceeds its prior-quarter value.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 latest vintage value exceeds its prior-quarter vintage value
evidence_refs: series:GDPC1
fact:GDPC1 vintage value was 22679.255 for 2023-10-01 in the 2024-04-15 snapshot
failure_condition: Reject if positive GDPC1 growth states have lower average 60-day S&P 500 returns than non-positive GDPC1 growth states across two consecutive 5-year walk-forward windows.
